raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX stole money from me. XXXX chose the method for payment for the shoes. I do not know XXXX -- he is not a family or a friend. When payment was made for shoes using my credit card, it was done by a XXXX  ( a XXXX XXXX XXXX ). The XXXX did not chose the method of payment. XXXX XXXX sent him a link to make the payment for the 100 pairs of shoes. He can not try to hide the behind the payment method he chose for the shoes. 

This transaction is a fraud in the inducement : ( XXXX ) XXXX tricked a XXXX XXXX XXXX ( who can not legally enter into a contract ) into using a payment method for which he was not authorized and ( 2 ) XXXX never had an intention of sending shoes. 

I contacted American Express XX/XX/XXXX and they are rebilling me for the charges. I NEVER received the merchandise. AMerican Express should not make me pay for items not received. 

AMerican Express has become a co-conspirator in the fraud being perpetrated by XXXX XXXX.
